task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: applies to category AM only if required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: applies to category AM only if required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Undergo a medical examination for categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

conditions.condition: when applying for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

task.label: Undergo a medical examination covering medical conditions set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: applies to category AM only if required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Require applicant to fill in a self-assessment form covering medical conditions set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
instead of requiring a medical examination

exception.description: to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III, such as appropriate assessment of eyesight

task.label: Fill in a self-assessment form covering medical conditions set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: when applying for issuance or renewal of a driving licence

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
instead of requiring a medical examination

exception.description: to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III, such as appropriate assessment of eyesight

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures to address non-compliance with self-assessment requirements
Apply alternative measure allowing monitoring of fitness to drive during periods of administrative validity
Ensure that applicant or holder undergoes a medical examination prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed in Annex III
on the basis of information acquired pursuant to alternative measures in paragraph 3

task.label: Undergo a medical examination prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed in Annex III
on the basis of information acquired pursuant to alternative measures in paragraph 3

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve knowledge about minimum standards of fitness for driving
Inform the Commission of adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet minimum standards of fitness to drive

task.label: Make guidelines available to other Member States

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines and inform the Commission

task.label: Inform the Commission of public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns to inform citizens about health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Make information available to other Member States

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns and inform the Commission

task.label: Set stricter standards than those set out in Annex III
